title: Saver Mask  K301 20pcs/box, For Industrial Use, CE Certificate
description: Saver™ specializes in high quality breathing and safety equipment for industrial and personal use since 1991.  Saver™ Face Mask Respirator is European FFP2 certified and feature an ergonomically streamlined design utilizing fine filter technology that helps to ensure exceptional filtering performance. This technology minimizes breathing resistance to provide comfort throughout the day.Utilizing 3 layers, it provides the highest filter efficiency and blocks airborne viruses spread by minute particulates.Saver™ From KoreaUSA #1 Dealer / Fast Shipping with Money Back GuaranteedHead Band same as 3M 8210 (Not ear band)FFP2 European Certificated3 Layers - Easy to BreatheHighest Filter EfficiencyBlocks Airborne Viruses spread by minute particlesIndustrial Dust-ProofMade from Korea / with highest StandardLight WeightSelf-supporting cup designN95 vs FFP2Most people will have heard of N95, especially now since the COVID-19 pandemic. N95 is an American standard managed by NIOSH, which is a part of the Center for Disease Control (CDC).Europe uses two different standards. Coming from the EN standard 149:2001 is the "filtering face piece" score (FFP). The standard is maintained by European Committee for Standardization (CEN).FFP1/P1 standard removes at least 80% of all particles that are 0.3 microns in diameter or larger. While FFP2/P2 removes at least 94% of all particles 0.3 microns or larger. European FFP2 standard is comparable to the American N95 standard (which removes at least 95%)
categories: Saver Mask  K301 20pcs/box, For Industrial Use, CE Certificate

title: Dressing Stone for Blade
description: Keep your tile and stone blades at their premium performance level with abrasive dressing stones from ZeredToday’s natural and man-made materials can quickly glaze even the best diamond blade. If you wait for a blade tobecome dull, it can cause serious damage to your material and even damage the blade. Coarse sharp abrasives in thedressing stone quickly expose new diamonds to keep your cuts clean and eliminate blow out at the beginning or endof a cut. For those materials that are hard, dense, and difficult to cut, we recommend dressing the blade frequently.

title: BioSeal Silicone Sealant General Purpose
description: BioSeal Silicone Clear General Purpose 10.1oz Silicone Sealant CaulkWater Proof50 Year DurabilityNo OdorApproved for Cultured MarbleExcellent Adhesion to GlassWindow & Door ApprovedEasy to Gun 4" inch TipNon-Sag & SlumpUV ProtectionZered BioSeal General Purpose Silicone Sealant Caulk provides excellent adhesion to cultured marble, tile, glass, vinyl, aluminum, and sheet metal without the need for a primer. It’s water-Proof, flexible, and won’t crack, crumble, or degrade. It is ideal for areas that could be exposed to weather such as windows, doors, molding, vents, baseboards, basements, attics, siding, and trim.The product is engineered to cure rapidly when exposed to atmospheric moisture, to form a durable tight bond that contractors and installers count on.Glass and Window ApprovedBathroom & Kitchen topGeneral Purpose GradeSuitable for both indoor and outdoor projectsFor Professional UseMarble/Granite/Quartz/Tiles/Ceramic/GlassHow to use:For best results, prepare clean surface. title: UNIBLOCK, 1 Lt,  Perfect Clear, Knife Grade
description: Manufactured and Imported from ITALYThe Uniblock 110 Hybrid Adhesive is a liquid transparent mastic to glue marble, granite, natural stone, and etc. It has excellent mechanical characteristics with a semi-solid consistency for a better knife grade. It offers exceptional chemical resistance also on alkaline supports and provides great adhesion on all kinds of natural and artificial stone with enough porosity.For bonding and stuccoing of:Synthetic agglomerates and engineered stonesNatural stonesMarbleGraniteCeramicsIts fast hardening properties (typically 7-10 minutes) and low exothermal peak for a modest shrinkage, leaves the surface dry without greasiness for easy honing and polishing. If you usually use Amkemi Platinum then you will see the difference.MSDSHow To Use:Apply on dry and clean materials free from greasy substances, dust, and friable with a 2% max. of hardener. Application temperature between +10°C and +30°C (50°F and 86°F). Apply within 1 to 2 minutes after mixing. The cold slows down and heat accelerates the hardening time. The hardened adhesive can be worked (polished, drilled, etc.) 40 minutes after hardening.Technical data: Hardening time: 7 to 10 minutes. Complete catalysis after 24 hours. Working time: 3 to 5 minutes
categories: UNIBLOCK, 1 Lt,  Perfect Clear, Knife Grade

title: OLD AGE, , COLOR ENHANCER, SOLVENT BASE, 1L
description: - Imported from ITALY- Solvent Base- Superior color enhancementMSDSOLD AGE is a further update of the range of the sealers and protecting agents with reviving effect.The product, conveyed by solvents of slow evaporation, making any film in surface, penetrates in depth also into thesmaller micro-porosities of the materials and grants to the treated support a multiplicity of effects:- WET and ENHANCING EFFECT: not turning yellow, stable to the atmospheric agents;- PROOFING EFFECT: water and oil repellent with development of an anti dirt barrier, but keeping unchanged the natural transpiration of the treated materials;- STRENGTHENING and ANTI POWDERING EFFECT: its binding and cross-linking characteristics and the nature of the contained polymers that are fixed permanently to the treated materials.FUNCTIONWet, enhancing, proofing, protecting, strengthening and anti powdering effect.Permanent reviving and protection of the treated surfaces.HOW TO USEPreparing the surface. Clean carefully the surfaces to be treated that must be dry, absorbent and free from alien andgreasy substances or friable parts.Application: Apply with clean cotton cloth or tampon and rub to help the penetration. Let the product work 10 to 15minutes and then, with other clean and dry cotton cloth, always remove the eventual excess of not absorbed productbefore they dry on the surface in order to avoid halos and opacities impossible to remove once dried
categories: OLD AGE, , COLOR ENHANCER, SOLVENT BASE, 1L

description: - Imported from ITALY- Impregnator, Water-Repellent, Antismog, Antimould, Protecting Agent- Solvent and Water BaseMSDSRain Stop makes the surface water repellent without interfering with the natural transpiration of the material. title: 1 Lt, POLIEPOXY, BUFF KNIFE GRADE
description:
Epoxy-Polyester special adhesive- Imported from ITALY- Can be used for Outside- Strong Glue like Epoxy- Fast Dry Time - 20 MinMSDSFunctionEPOXY-POLYESTER SPECIAL ADHESIVE for MARBLE, GRANITE, STONEHow to useFor best results mix 2% to 3% of the catalyst (dibenzoyl peroxide in special formulation) with the adhesive.The paste formula makes easy to measure. A homogeneous mixing will facilitate uniform catalysis. Thecatalysis speed is influenced by the temperature and by the proportion/quantity of catalyst. An excess ofhardener/catalyst will increase the hardening speed, but weakens the adhesive seal. The surfaces to betreated/glued must be clean and dry and greasy substance free; porosity and a light roughness of thesurface favour the best adhesion.The hardened/cured adhesive is completely workable (grinding, polishing, sanding, buffing, etc.) after 2-5 hours.APPLICATIONS
POLIEPOXY®
 is recommended for permanent gluing, even in the most difficult situations, of MARBLES, GRANITES,
STONES, CONCRETE, IRON and for gluing heterogeneous materials.
PREPARATION
For best results mix 2% to 3% of the catalyst (dibenzoyl peroxide in special formulation) with the adhesive; the version in
paste facilitates the dosage. A homogeneous mixing will facilitate uniform catalysis. The catalysis speed is influenced by the
temperature and by the proportion/quantity of catalyst. An excess of hardener/catalyst will increase the hardening speed, but
weakens the adhesive seal. The surfaces to be treated/glued must be clean and dry and greasy substance free; porosity
and a light roughness of the surface favour the best adhesion.
The hardened/cured adhesive is completely workable (grinding, polishing, sanding, buffing, etc.) after 2 to 5 hours.Technical Data
